focus: Status snapshot closure and P0/P1 contradiction check
keyFindings: Q-P0 winner remains command-owned Copilot target authority because resolveCopilotPromptArg still only chooses raw prompt versus @PROMPT_PATH and has no approved-folder or plan-only Gate 3 contract.
Q-P1 winner remains an isolated SPEC_KIT_DB_DIR degraded-graph harness because unit coverage already exercises all fallbackDecision branches while the stress gap was end-to-end degraded state.

Q-P2 winner is a new non-mutating getGraphReadinessSnapshot helper for code_graph_status; getGraphFreshness currently loses action/reason detail, while ensureCodeGraphReady is unsuitable because it caches, cleans deleted tracked files, and can index.
Do not lower file-watcher debounce first; existing debounce/write-stability/concurrency/dedupe behavior makes status action visibility the lower-risk first fix.
Q-ARCH should carry target-authority vs recovered-context and readiness-action vs freshness-label as the two scoped seams.
